data.feedback: Keep your body straight from head to heels. Lower your chest closer to the floor.
Bend your elbows more to go deeper. Keep your hips level with your shoulders.
Lower your body further toward the ground. Keep your feet and ankles still.
Focus on keeping a straight line through your legs. Bend your arms more as you lower down.
Lower your chest more during each pushup. Keep your legs straight and steady.
Go lower toward the floor. Keep your body in a straight line.
Bend your elbows more to get closer to the ground. Keep your legs straight.
Keep your feet from shifting. Lower your body closer to the floor.
Bend your arms fully. Keep your whole body straight like a board.

summary: Great effort on these reps! Keeping a straight body and going deeper will help you build strength much faster.
